evidence.claim: There is a queue of patients with different priorities.
evidence.fact: This platform continuously reorders the waiting list so that the most critical patients are seen first.
evidence.user_story_span: Given there is a queue of patients with different priorities
evidence.fact_span: This platform continuously reorders the waiting list so that the most critical patients are seen first.

evidence.claim: The system ensures that the highest-priority patient is selected next.
evidence.fact: This platform continuously reorders the waiting list so that the most critical patients are seen first.
evidence.user_story_span: The system ensures that the highest-priority patient is selected next.
evidence.fact_span: This platform continuously reorders the waiting list so that the most critical patients are seen first.

evidence.claim: Dequeuing removes the patient from the queue.
evidence.fact: Taking the patient removes them from the queue.
evidence.fact_span: Taking the patient removes them from the queue.

evidence.claim: The system returns the patient with the highest priority.
evidence.fact: This platform continuously reorders the waiting list so that the most critical patients are seen first.

evidence.fact_span: This platform continuously reorders the waiting list so that the most critical patients are seen first.

evidence.claim: The patient queue is sorted by priority (e.g., triage level, severity).
evidence.fact: The system assigns each patient an urgency level from 1 (critical) to 5 (non-urgent) based on symptoms.

evidence.fact_span: The system assigns each patient an urgency level from 1 (critical) to 5 (non-urgent) based on symptoms.
